attendee_01.name: Attendee Jamie
attendee_01.dialogBefore: This is my first conference! I keep running into bugs!
attendee_01.dialogAfter: Wow, you really squashed that bug...

attendee_02.name: Attendee Morgan
attendee_02.dialogBefore: I've been writing Rails for six months now. Can you handle my bugs?
attendee_02.dialogAfter: Back to the tutorials for me...

attendee_03.name: Attendee Riley
attendee_03.dialogBefore: My code has 100% coverage but bugs keep slipping through! Can your gems squash them?

speaker_andrew.name: Speaker Andrew
speaker_andrew.dialogBefore: The Ruby community isn't something you join, it's something you help create!
speaker_andrew.dialogAfter: That's what the community is about. Keep contributing!

speaker_02.name: Speaker Alex
speaker_02.dialogBefore: Full-stack means I've got bugs for every layer!

speaker_kieran.name: Speaker Kieran
speaker_kieran.dialogBefore: Every bug is data. Fix it once, prevent it forever.
speaker_kieran.dialogAfter: Lesson logged. Your system just got smarter.

speaker_matheus.name: Speaker Matheus
speaker_matheus.dialogBefore: You don't need engines or new languages. Ruby is all you need.
speaker_matheus.dialogAfter: Ten years in and Ruby still brings me joy.

test_minion_05.name: Attendee Avery
test_minion_05.dialogBefore: I just found my first bug! Want to see it?
test_minion_05.dialogAfter: Ok that bug didn't stand a chance...

test_minion_02.name: Attendee Quinn
test_minion_02.dialogBefore: I found some bugs in my code! Let me throw them at you!

test_minion_03.name: QA Advocate Lee
test_minion_03.dialogBefore: No code ships without fixing these bugs first. Not on my watch!
test_minion_03.dialogAfter: Your gems handled those bugs impressively...

ifat_ribon.name: Speaker Ifat
ifat_ribon.dialogBefore: AI can write tests in seconds, but it can't tell you which ones matter (yet).
ifat_ribon.dialogAfter: I think you have a good understanding of clear, maintainable tests.

organizer_01.name: Organizer Jordan
organizer_01.dialogBefore: I organized this whole conference. Think your gems can handle the worst bugs?

parking_01.name: Junior Dev Casey
parking_01.dialogBefore: I just deployed my first app and everything is breaking!
parking_01.dialogAfter: Maybe I should have written tests first...

parking_02.name: Frontend Dev Skyler
parking_02.dialogBefore: My CSS is pixel perfect but my JavaScript is full of bugs!
parking_02.dialogAfter: I should have checked the console...

parking_03.name: Senior Dev Dana
parking_03.dialogBefore: I've been debugging production issues all day. Want to see what I found?
parking_03.dialogAfter: You handled those like a pro...

indie_jeremy.name: Indie Dev Jeremy
indie_jeremy.dialogBefore: I have my own conference you know, Blue Ridge Ruby.
indie_jeremy.dialogAfter: You handled those bugs well. Maybe you should be a speaker!

justin_bowen.name: Active Agent Justin
justin_bowen.dialogBefore: An agent is just a controller with a persona. Nothing mystical.
justin_bowen.dialogAfter: Retry logic keeps hallucinations out of production.
